title: cynorkis glandulosa
intro: Cynorkis glandulosa, also known as the African orchid or orchid, is a flowering plant species native to tropical Africa. Traditionally, Cynorkis glandulosa has been used in medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of this plant include treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis, coughs, and asthma, as well as reducing fever and relieving rheumatic pains. In herbal preparations, Cynorkis glandulosa is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties for therapeutic purposes.
